hero.headline:
Capturing the
Energy Behind
the Music.
hero.supporting: I photograph artists, moments and stories that move people.

about.heading:
Born in Tanzania.
Raised in England.
Now based in Los Angeles.
about.body:
My journey has taken me from backstage to centre stage, working with some of the biggest names in music and photographing the moments that shape their stories.

I shoot concerts, portraits, campaigns and behind the scenes content for artists, labels and brands.
